series_metadata.series_description: The Bid File consists of administrative documents regarding Invitations to Bid(s) and Requests for Proposal(s). The file contains the following items: competitive bid checklist and all documents described in the competitive bid checklist; final copy of RFP or ITB; any addendums to bid, DAS Request to Purchase email; BWC approval to issue letter; signed confidentiality agreements; supplier Q & A; bid opening log; final scoring; supplier award letter and copy of the signed contract.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in Procurement Unit four years Bid opening, move offsite storage. contracts goods length of contract . contracts services length of contract 9 years, and ; Electronic: in Procurement Bid File on I drive length of contract and
